overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a truck driving simulator, showing a journey through a snowy mountain highway. The player exits a tunnel, drives through a snow-covered forest, overtakes a slower truck, and approaches another tunnel entrance while wipers clear falling snow from the windshield.

events.description: exiting rocky tunnel into open snowy mountain landscape
transitioning from dark tunnel interior to overcast daylight

agents.ego_description: steering truck out of the tunnel onto the snow-covered highway, accelerating to cruising speed

entered.detail: dark rock wall of the tunnel interior with snow at the base
cream-colored tassel curtain hanging above the windshield
small figurine on the dashboard to the right of the steering wheel
dense pine trees covered in snow lining both sides of the highway
metal highway guardrail partially buried in snow

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a rocky tunnel with low lighting, then transitions to a bright, snow-covered mountain highway. The truck emerges from the tunnel into a winter landscape with dense snow-laden forests on both sides and active windshield wipers clearing falling snow.

events.description: approaching slower moving truck ahead on the highway

agents.ego_description: following a white commercial truck with red branding along the winding snow-covered highway

notable_agents.action: white box truck with PODRAVKA logo driving slowly in the same lane ahead

entered.detail: road sign indicating directions and distances

segments.scene_description: Driving through an open stretch of snow-covered highway flanked by dense forests. The camera follows a slower PODRAVKA truck in the distance while passing highway signs on the right. The windshield wipers maintain visibility through steady snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overtaking zone with rocky cliffside

events.description: steering left to enter the left lane and begin overtaking the truck
the side of the truck temporarily blocks the view of the road ahead during the overtake
completing the overtake and steering right to merge back into the right lane

agents.ego_description: overtaking the slower truck by accelerating in the left lane then checking the side mirror after passing

notable_agents.action: PODRAVKA truck being overtaken, visible in the left side mirror after being passed

entered.detail: snow-dusted rock face replacing the forest on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The truck moves into the left lane to overtake the slower PODRAVKA truck. The left side of the road features a rocky cliff face instead of forest. After passing, the driver checks the side mirror showing the overtaken truck receding behind, while the guardrail passes closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain highway approaching tunnel entrance

events.description: navigating a gentle left curve on the snowy highway
tunnel entrance becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding highway toward the next tunnel, maintaining steady speed through the snowfall

entered.detail: dark tunnel entrance cut into the snow-covered rock face ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the truck continuing through the snowy mountain landscape after the overtake. The road curves gently through dense snow-covered forests with the guardrail running along the right side. A tunnel entrance gradually approaches from the distance, growing larger in the frame as the truck drives toward it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the dim confines of a rocky tunnel into a bright, snow-covered mountain landscape that eventually leads toward another tunnel entrance. It begins by emerging from the low lighting of the tunnel into a winter scene where windshield wipers clear falling snow against a backdrop of dense, snow-laden forests. As the truck proceeds along the open highway, the camera follows a slower PODRAVKA truck before shifting into the left lane to overtake it, transitioning from forest views to a stark rocky cliff face on the left. After the overtake, the driver glances at the side mirror to see the other truck receding while the road curves gently back through the thick woods. The scene finally closes as the truck drives forward, with the distant mouth of a new tunnel gradually expanding to fill the frame.
